title: Trave in legno C24
description: Trave appoggio-appoggio con carichi permanenti e variabile.

model.title: Trave in legno C24
model.description: Trave appoggio-appoggio con carichi permanenti e variabile.

verification.summary: Timber beam bending, shear, lateral stability and deflection verification from FEM beam results.

checks.description: Timber lateral-torsional stability with weak-axis moment interaction

assumptions: Timber lateral-torsional stability is checked on ULS FEM principal-axis bending for declared unbraced segments; automatic kcrit is limited to rectangular sections unless kcrit or sigmaMcrit is provided.
The strong-axis moment My is reduced by kcrit; any weak-axis moment Mz from section rotation is included as an elastic weak-axis bending term.
SLE vertical deflection limit defaults to L/300 unless overridden.

checks.description: Biaxial bending stress verification on principal section axes
Biaxial shear verification on principal section axes

The strong-axis moment My is reduced by kcrit; any weak-axis moment Mz from section rotation is included as an elastic weak-axis bending term.
SLE vertical deflection limit defaults to L/300 unless overridden.
